tagline: Seamless Banking Integration for Modern Nigerian Businesses

sections.name: Hero
sections.copy: Powering Financial Innovation Across Nigeria. Mr Simple Open Banking Co delivers enterprise-grade API solutions that connect your business to the future of digital finance. From card issuing to seamless payment integration, we provide the infrastructure that drives growth.
sections.imagePrompt: Modern Nigerian fintech office with large glass windows overlooking Lagos or Owerri cityscape, sleek computers displaying financial dashboards, young professional Nigerian developers collaborating, warm natural lighting, corporate blue and white color scheme, photorealistic, professional photography style

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy: Mr Simple Open Banking Co (operating as Mr Simple API Finance Limited) is a leading Nigerian fintech company headquartered in Ngor Okpala, Imo State. Led by experienced card issuer operations professionals, we specialize in open banking solutions that empower businesses to integrate sophisticated financial services into their platforms. Our API-first approach enables banks, fintechs, and enterprises across Nigeria to launch card programs, process payments, and deliver exceptional financial experiences to their customers. We combine deep industry expertise with cutting-edge technology to bridge the gap between traditional banking and digital innovation.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional Nigerian fintech team meeting in modern conference room, diverse group of executives reviewing financial reports on large screen, Ngor Okpala business district visible through windows, natural daylight, corporate setting, photorealistic, high-end business photography

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
Card Issuing Solutions: Launch branded debit and prepaid card programs with full regulatory compliance and real-time transaction monitoring.

Open Banking APIs: Secure, scalable APIs for account aggregation, payment initiation, and balance verification across multiple Nigerian banks.

Payment Processing: End-to-end payment infrastructure supporting card payments, bank transfers, and digital wallet integration.

Compliance & Operations: Expert card issuer operations management ensuring CBN compliance, fraud prevention, and seamless customer onboarding.

API Integration Support: Comprehensive technical documentation, sandbox environments, and dedicated developer support for rapid integration.
sections.imagePrompt: Split-screen montage showing Nigerian ATM card being used at modern POS terminal, smartphone displaying banking API dashboard, secure server room with blue lighting, financial transaction animations, professional fintech aesthetic, photorealistic, corporate technology photography

sections.name: Get Started
sections.copy:
Ready to transform your financial services? Our team of card issuer operations experts is ready to design a solution tailored to your business needs. Whether you're launching a new fintech product or enhancing existing banking services, Mr Simple Open Banking Co provides the infrastructure and expertise you need to succeed in Nigeria's dynamic digital finance landscape.

Contact us today for a consultation and discover how our open banking solutions can accelerate your growth.
sections.imagePrompt: Modern Nigerian fintech office reception area with company branding, professional receptionist at sleek desk, comfortable waiting area with financial technology displays, glass doors showing Ngor Okpala business environment, warm professional lighting, photorealistic, corporate interior photography

contact.address: Umudim Junction, Ohekelem Ngor Okpala, Imo State, Nigeria
